languages.text: "Какие же вы упрямые. Как ваш полк еще не вымер?"
"Headstrong, the both of you. How has your regiment not died out yet?"
languages.original_text: "Какие же вы упрямые. Как ваш полк еще не вымер?"

traits.locale_text: "Headstrong, the both of you. How has your regiment not died out yet?"
"Headstrong, the both of you. How has your regiment not died out yet?"
"Headstrong, the both of you. How has your regiment not died out yet?"
"Headstrong, the both of you. How has your regiment not died out yet?"

languages.text: 「おぬし達、頑固だな。どうして部隊は消滅していないんだ？」
languages.original_text: "Headstrong, the both of you. How has your regiment not died out yet?"

traits.locale_text: 「おぬし達、頑固だな。どうして部隊は消滅していないんだ？」

languages.text: "İkiniz de dik kafalısınız. Alayınız nasıl oldu da hâlâ yok olmadı?"
languages.original_text: "Headstrong, the both of you. How has your regiment not died out yet?"

traits.locale_text: "İkiniz de dik kafalısınız. Alayınız nasıl oldu da hâlâ yok olmadı?"

languages.text: «Son demasiado testarudos. ¿Cómo ha sobrevivido hasta ahora su regimiento?».
languages.original_text: "Headstrong, the both of you. How has your regiment not died out yet?"

traits.locale_text: «Son demasiado testarudos. ¿Cómo ha sobrevivido hasta ahora su regimiento?».

languages.text: “两个死脑筋。你们的军团是怎么活到现在的？”
languages.original_text: "Headstrong, the both of you. How has your regiment not died out yet?"

traits.locale_text: “两个死脑筋。你们的军团是怎么活到现在的？”

languages.text: « Vous êtes aussi têtus l'un que l'autre. Je me demande bien comment votre régiment a réussi à survivre aussi longtemps. »
languages.original_text: "Headstrong, the both of you. How has your regiment not died out yet?"

traits.locale_text: « Vous êtes aussi têtus l'un que l'autre. Je me demande bien comment votre régiment a réussi à survivre aussi longtemps. »

languages.text: "Ihr seid eigensinnig, alle beide. Wie kommt es, dass Euer Regiment noch nicht tot ist?"
languages.original_text: "Headstrong, the both of you. How has your regiment not died out yet?"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr seid eigensinnig, alle beide. Wie kommt es, dass Euer Regiment noch nicht tot ist?"
